strategies.name: liquid_low_vol
strategies.description: Liquid names with volatility control.

strategies.name: reversal_defensive
strategies.description: Defensive short-term reversal.

strategies.name: drawdown_guard
strategies.description: Avoids bonds in deeper recent drawdown while keeping price and liquidity discipline.

strategies.name: stable_liquidity
strategies.description: Focuses on stable active bonds with controlled intraday amplitude.

strategies.name: trend_band
strategies.description: Preferred price band plus trend confirmation.

strategies.name: double_low_core
strategies.description: Double-low style ranking when premium data is available.

strategies.name: premium_defensive
strategies.description: Lower premium with defensive liquidity and redemption-risk controls.

strategies.name: ytm_size_defensive
strategies.description: Yield, size, rating, and low-volatility defensive mix.

strategies.name: stock_confirmed
strategies.description: Uses underlying-stock confirmation when stock codes are available.

strategies.name: consistency_trend
strategies.description: Steady positive days, controlled downside, and a modest trend.

strategies.name: tail_guard
strategies.description: Avoids bonds with jumpy amplitude, large downside tails, and poor drawdown behavior.

strategies.name: liquidity_acceleration
strategies.description: Improving liquidity without giving up price and volatility discipline.

strategies.name: channel_recovery
strategies.description: Recovery inside the recent price channel with controlled gap risk.

strategies.name: maturity_defensive
strategies.description: Remaining-term, size, YTM, and price-band defenses.

strategies.name: ai_r1_return_1_consistency_trend
strategies.description: AI iteration 1: return variant based on consistency_trend.

strategies.name: ai_r1_return_3_channel_recovery
strategies.description: AI iteration 1: return variant based on channel_recovery.

strategies.name: ai_r1_return_4_tail_guard
strategies.description: AI iteration 1: return variant based on tail_guard.

strategies.name: ai_r1_return_1_trend_band
strategies.description: AI iteration 1: return variant based on trend_band.

strategies.name: ai_r1_return_4_ai_r1_return_3_channel_recovery
strategies.description: AI iteration 1: return variant based on ai_r1_return_3_channel_recovery.

strategies.name: ai_r2_trend_band_tail_control
strategies.description: Keeps the successful trend_band core but shifts some momentum exposure into downside and tail-risk controls to improve drawdown and monthly loss behavior.

strategies.name: ai_r2_trend_consistency_band
strategies.description: A trend-band variant aimed at improving monthly win rate by combining trend confirmation with up-day consistency and controlled downside volatility.

strategies.name: ai_r2_band_gap_drawdown_guard
strategies.description: Tests whether the strong low-drawdown trend_band result can be stabilized further with gap-risk and drawdown controls while retaining price-band discipline.

strategies.name: ai_r2_channel_trend_low_tail
strategies.description: A genuinely different channel-position approach that blends price-channel recovery with trend confirmation and explicit tail-risk control.

strategies.name: ai_r3_channel_gap_downside_guard
strategies.description: Keeps the winning channel-position and trend core, but shifts weight from pure reversal into gap, downside-volatility, and tail-loss controls to target lower drawdown and monthly loss.

strategies.name: ai_r3_channel_band_drawdown_stable
strategies.description: Blends channel recovery with price-band discipline and explicit drawdown/volatility controls, aiming to preserve return while moving closer to the drawdown constraint.

strategies.name: ai_r3_consistent_channel_trend
strategies.description: Tests whether the channel-recovery edge improves monthly win rate when combined with up-day consistency and moderate downside controls.

strategies.name: ai_r4_channel_structural_safety
strategies.description: Keeps the channel recovery edge but adds forced-redemption, size, and listing-age controls to test whether structural bond filters reduce drawdown without relying on weak premium data.

strategies.name: ai_r4_low_price_channel_guard
strategies.description: Tests whether adding low-price discipline to the successful channel setup improves downside behavior while retaining trend and gap controls.

strategies.name: ai_r4_consistency_size_downside
strategies.description: A more defensive alternative emphasizing positive-day consistency, downside volatility, stable liquidity, and remaining size to see if monthly win rate and drawdown improve versus channel-heavy variants.

strategies.name: ai_next_channel_drawdown_tail_core
strategies.description: Concentrates the proven channel recovery edge while replacing weak return-chasing exposure with explicit drawdown, downside volatility, gap, and tail controls.

strategies.name: ai_next_band_channel_low_price_guard
strategies.description: Tests whether low-price and preferred-band discipline can reduce the large drawdown seen in the highest-return channel strategy while keeping channel and trend exposure.

strategies.name: ai_next_consistency_downside_liquid
strategies.description: A non-channel control candidate focused on monthly win-rate and drawdown behavior through consistency, downside volatility, liquidity quality, and price-band discipline.
